name: WebBench read #2204
goal:
Navigate to the "About Yale" section and summarize Yale University's mission statement in your own words.
Only use http://yale.edu to achieve the task. Don't go to any other site. The task is achievable with just navigation from this site.
Only use www.yale.edu for this task.
